property_description: Allows the bound user to use the chosen ability once per day, so long as they already know that ability.
property_limitations: Only abilities that have a per-day Usage, and do not have a Tier Limit may be chosen.

property_description: Allows the bound user to use the chosen ability once per day. Only abilities that may be selected per-day may be chosen.
property_limitations: Only abilities that have a per-day Usage, and do not have a Tier Limit may be chosen.

property_description: Allows the bound user to use the chosen ability once per encounter, so long as they already know that ability. Only abilities that may be selected per-day may be chosen.
property_limitations: Only abilities that have a per-day Usage, and do not have a Tier Limit may be chosen.

property_description: Increases the base damage dealt by the weapon by 1 against a specific creature type, chosen when the enchantment is created. This damage is doubled as normal if wielded in two hands.
property_limitations: Weapon Only. Only the most powerful Slaying enchantment worn affects a bound user.

property_description: Increases the base damage dealt by the weapon by 2 against a specific creature type, chosen when the enchantment is created. This damage is doubled as normal if wielded in two hands.
property_limitations: Weapon Only. Only the most powerful Slaying enchantment worn affects a bound user.

property_description: Increases the base damage dealt by the weapon by 3 against a specific creature type, chosen when the enchantment is created. This damage is doubled as normal if wielded in two hands.
property_limitations: Weapon Only. Only the most powerful Slaying enchantment worn affects a bound user.

property_description: Grants the bound user 5 temporary armor at the start of each encounter. If this character has Armor of Faith, this temporary armor is added to their Armor of Faith armor.
property_limitations: Shield, Helmet, Breastplate Only. Only the most powerful Defender enchantment worn affects a bound user.

property_description: Grants the bound user 10 temporary armor at the start of each encounter. If this character has Armor of Faith, this temporary armor is added to their Armor of Faith armor.
property_limitations: Shield, Helmet, Breastplate Only. Only the most powerful Defender enchantment worn affects a bound user.

property_description: Grants the bound user 15 temporary armor at the start of each encounter. If this character has Armor of Faith, this temporary armor is added to their Armor of Faith armor.
property_limitations: Shield, Helmet, Breastplate Only. Only the most powerful Defender enchantment worn affects a bound user.

property_description: Grants the user an additional 5 points to their Lay on Hands pool, 10 points to their Magic Missiles pool, or an additional 20 points to their Elemental Blast pool.
property_limitations: May only be cast in a given vessel once.

property_description: Grants the user an additional 10 points to their Lay on Hands pool, 20 points to their Magic Missiles pool, or an additional 40 points to their Elemental Blast pool.
property_limitations: May only be cast in a given vessel once.

property_description: Grants the user an additional 15 points to their Lay on Hands pool, 30 points to their Magic Missiles pool, or an additional 60 points to their Elemental Blast pool.
property_limitations: May only be cast in a given vessel once.

property_description: You gain 5 Vampiric Health, which is set to 0 at the start of every encounter, but is otherwise a bonus to your health total. You may touch a dead creature and begin a Ten Second "Draining" count. For every two seconds of the count completed, you regain 1 point of health up to your maximum. Each corpse may only be drained once.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Vampiric enchantment worn affects a bound user.

property_description: You gain 10 Vampiric Health, which is set to 0 at the start of every encounter, but is otherwise a bonus to your health total. You may touch a dead creature and begin a Ten Second "Draining" count. For every two seconds of the count completed, you regain 1 point of health up to your maximum. Each corpse may only be drained once.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Vampiric enchantment worn affects a bound user.

property_description: You gain 15 Vampiric Health, which is set to 0 at the start of every encounter, but is otherwise a bonus to your health total. You may touch a dead creature and begin a Ten Second "Draining" count. For every two seconds of the count completed, you regain 1 point of health up to your maximum. Each corpse may only be drained once.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Vampiric enchantment worn affects a bound user.

property_description: At any time, you may gain 5 temporary armor upon completion of a 10 second "Shielding" count.
property_limitations: Shields only

property_description: At any time, you may gain 10 temporary armor upon completion of a 10 second "Shielding" count.
property_limitations: Shields only

property_description: At any time, you may gain 15 temporary armor upon completion of a 10 second "Shielding" count.
property_limitations: Shields only

property_description: You choose one damage type from Acid, Ice, Fire, or Shock. Abilities or Expertise you use that deal this damage type deal an additional 3 damage of that type.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Focusing enchantment for a given damage type affects a bound user. You may have multiple focusing enchantments so long as they affect different damage types.

property_description: You choose one damage type from Acid, Ice, Fire, or Shock. Abilities or Expertise you use that deal this damage type deal an additional 7 damage of that type.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Focusing enchantment for a given damage type affects a bound user. You may have multiple focusing enchantments so long as they affect different damage types.

property_description: You choose one damage type from Acid, Ice, Fire, or Shock. Abilities or Expertise you use that deal this damage type deal an additional 10 damage of that type.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Focusing enchantment for a given damage type affects a bound user. You may have multiple focusing enchantments so long as they affect different damage types.

property_description: You deal 1 bonus damage with this weapon when striking while fully behind your target.
property_limitations: Weapon Only. Only the most powerful Subtle enchantment worn affects a bound user.

property_description: You deal 2 bonus damage with this weapon when striking while fully behind your target.
property_limitations: Weapon Only. Only the most powerful Subtle enchantment worn affects a bound user.

property_description: You deal 3 bonus damage with this weapon when striking while fully behind your target.
property_limitations: Weapon Only. Only the most powerful Subtle enchantment worn affects a bound user.

property_description: Once per day when hit with a damaging effect, you may gain Resilience to the damage dealt by that effect, and call "Reduced Effect."
property_limitations: Shield Only.

property_description: Once per encounter when hit with a damaging effect, you may gain Resilience to the damage dealt by that effect, and call "Reduced Effect."
property_limitations: Shield Only.

property_description: You choose a condition from one of the following: Fear, Immobilize, Push, or Wither. Once per day, the user of this item may call Spell {Condition} 5 on a successful strike with this weapon.
property_limitations: Weapon only.

property_description: You choose a condition from one of the following: Blight, Charm, Hemorrhage, Silence, or Slow. Once per day, the user of this item may call Spell {Condition} 30 on a successful strike with this weapon..
property_limitations: Weapon only.

property_description: You choose a condition from one of the following: Paralyze, Sleep, or Waste. Once per day, the user of this item may call Spell {Condition} 60.
property_limitations: Weapon only.

property_description: Once per day, the user of this item may call Spell Counter All on a successful strike with this weapon.
property_limitations: Weapon only.

property_description: Once per day, the user of this item may call Spell Sunder on a successful strike with this weapon.
property_limitations: Weapon only.

property_description: Once per day, the user of this item may call Spell Death or Spell Life on a successful strike with this weapon.
property_limitations: Weapon only.

property_description: You gain vulnerability to acid damage. This vulnerability stacks with other instances of this vulnerability, causing you to take 100% of the original damage again for each. Unlike other curses, you are not subjected to Waste at the start of each encounter if you have multiple instances of this curse.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: You gain vulnerability to cold damage. This vulnerability stacks with other instances of this vulnerability, causing you to take 100% of the original damage again for each. Unlike other curses, you are not subjected to Waste at the start of each encounter if you have multiple instances of this curse.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: You gain vulnerability to fire damage. This vulnerability stacks with other instances of this vulnerability, causing you to take 100% of the original damage again for each. Unlike other curses, you are not subjected to Waste at the start of each encounter if you have multiple instances of this curse.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: You gain vulnerability to shock damage. This vulnerability stacks with other instances of this vulnerability, causing you to take 100% of the original damage again for each. Unlike other curses, you are not subjected to Waste at the start of each encounter if you have multiple instances of this curse.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: You gain vulnerability to common Damage and Pierce damage. This vulnerability stacks with other instances of this vulnerability, causing you to take 100% of the original damage again for each.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Your damage calls with basic weapon attacks are reduced by half (Minimum 1.)
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Your damage calls with abilities are reduced by half (Minimum 1.)
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: All damage calls you make are reduced by half.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Your maximum health is reduced by 5 to a minimum of 1.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Your maximum health is reduced by 10 to a minimum of 1.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Your maximum health is reduced by 15 to a minimum of 1.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: All healing effects on you heal for half their normal amount, to a minimum of 1 point. Effects that would fully heal you instead heal you to half. Effects that would heal you to half instead heal you to one quarter.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Any time a life or death effect would raise you from the Dead status to 1 hp, you instead are set to the Dying status, and immediately begin your Dying Count.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Any time you are subjected to a Waste effect, you instead suffer whichever Death or Life effect reduces you to the Dead status. Resists to Waste do not prevent this effect occurring.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Any time you are subjected to a Paralyze effect, you instead suffer whichever Death or Life effect reduces you to the Dead status. Resists to Paralyze do not prevent this effect occurring.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Any time you are subjected to a Blight effect, you instead suffer whichever Death or Life effect reduces you to the Dead status. Resists to Blight do not prevent this effect occurring. This effect only extends to the Curse call, not curses granted by items.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Any time you are subjected to a Charm effect, you instead suffer whichever Death or Life effect reduces you to the Dead status. Resists to Charm do not prevent this effect occurring.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Any time you are subjected to a Silence effect, you instead suffer whichever Death or Life effect reduces you to the Dead status. Resists to Silence do not prevent this effect occurring.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Any time you are subjected to a Slow effect, you instead suffer whichever Death or Life effect reduces you to the Dead status. Resists to Slow do not prevent this effect occurring.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Any time you are subjected to a Hemorrhage effect, you instead suffer whichever Death or Life effect reduces you to the Dead status. Resists to Hemorrhage do not prevent this effect occurring.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Any time you are subjected to a Sunder effect, you instead suffer whichever Death or Life effect reduces you to the Dead status. Resists to Sunder do not prevent this effect occurring.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Any time you are subjected to a Push effect, you instead suffer whichever Death or Life effect reduces you to the Dead status. Resists to Push do not prevent this effect occurring.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Any time you are subjected to a Sleep effect, you instead suffer whichever Death or Life effect reduces you to the Dead status. Resists to Sleep do not prevent this effect occurring.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Any time you are subjected to a Fear effect, you instead suffer whichever Death or Life effect reduces you to the Dead status. Resists to Fear do not prevent this effect occurring.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Any time you are subjected to a Immobilize effect, you instead suffer whichever Death or Life effect reduces you to the Dead status. Resists to Immobilize do not prevent this effect occurring.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Any time you are subjected to a Wither effect, you instead suffer whichever Death or Life effect reduces you to the Dead status. Resists to Wither do not prevent this effect occurring.
property_limitations: Only one curse may be applied to an item at a time.

property_description: Create a Ward with a magical charge of 15. Once set, the ward may not be moved moved for one week. When the Ward's charge is reduced to 0, it is breached for 900 seconds, at which point its charge is restored. An Enchanter who is touching the ward may spend 60s to reduce the charge by their Enchanter level. Multiple Enchanters may do this at the same time. At the start of each day, a character is branded by the bound user with an invisible wizard sigil allowing them entry through the ward. This is to be marked on a note containing that character's name along with the physrep. A large W must be present in blue on the physrep, which must be next to the door to the building. Each ward protects one building, which must be a permanent structure. If a ward protects a single entrance to a building, it also protect its windows and other minor entrances. Creatures without a sigil cannot pass through the ward whether insubstantial and phased or not, but spells and abilities can.
property_limitations: A ward may never take less than 5 minutes to breach. A staff marshal must be present for the duration.
